device_name: HERA W10 Diagnostic Ultrasound System; HERA W9 Diagnostic Ultrasound System
intended_use: The Diagnostic Ultrasound System and transducers are intended for diagnostic ultrasound imaging and fluid analysis of the human body. The clinical applications include: Fetal/Obstetrics, Abdominal, Gy
intended_use_full: The Diagnostic Ultrasound System and transducers are intended for diagnostic ultrasound imaging and fluid analysis of the human body. The clinical applications include: Fetal/Obstetrics, Abdominal, Gynecology, Pediatric, Small Organ, Neonatal Cephalic, Adult Cephalic, Trans-rectal, Trans-vaginal, Muscular-Skeletal (Conventional, Superficial), Urology, Cardiac Adult, Cardiac Pediatric and Peripheral vessel.
target_condition: Fetal biometry assessment during obstetric ultrasound
ground_truth: Manual segmentation and measurement by three expert reviewers (one obstetrician with >20 years experience and two sonographers with >10 years experience in fetal cardiology), supervised by an obstetrician with >25 years experience
other_metrics: Segmentation: average dice-score 0.91 (threshold 0.8); Circumference measurement error rate 8% or less; Distance measurement error rate 4% or less; NT measurement error rate 1mm or less
